instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Helping with the school garden
task.initialEmail: Hi,||Some students are helping to improve the school garden next week. [1]Would you like to help us?[/1]||[2]We’re starting at 8 a.m. on Saturday. Is that too early?[/2]||[3]What should we plant in the garden?[/3] The teachers want it to look colourful.||[4]Can you bring any tools from home?[/4]||Write back soon||Jack

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Jack,||Thanks for telling me about the garden. [1]Yes, I’d like to help because I enjoy working outside and I think the school garden needs to look better.[/1]||[2]Yes, eight o’clock is too early for me because I usually have breakfast with my family on Saturday mornings. Could I come at nine?[/2]||[3]We should plant some bright flowers near the entrance because everyone will see them there.[/3]||[4]I can bring a small spade and some gardening gloves from home.[/4]||I can also bring some water.||See you on Saturday,||Ethan
